data.title: Wonderer
data.synopsis:
An arrow appears in front of a "WONDERER" who is curious about something. "What on earth is at the end of that arrow?" This curiosity leads one man to an unknown place. He continues to move forward toward his goal, feeling nervous and excited about the adventures that await him at each destination.

(Source: U-NEXT, translated)

data.title: Ganbare! Nakamura-kun!!
data.synopsis:
Okuto Nakamura is a timid and gloomy-looking student who cherishes only two things in this world: his pet octopus and his kind-hearted classmate, Aiki Hirose. Ever since the school entrance ceremony, Nakamura has admired his jovial classmate, albeit from a distance due to his poor social skills. After mustering up all the courage within him, he finally decides to talk to Hirose.

During this first attempt to make contact, an instinctive mistake turns the idea of friendship into a distant dream, as he creates a hilarious impression on his crush. At school, students are expected to cooperate on numerous activities together, meaning Nakamura gets to spend extra time with Hirose. Given these opportunities, can he successfully redeem himself and accomplish his goal of becoming good friends with Hirose?

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: Wo de Wei Xin Tong Longgong
My WeChat is connected to Dragon Palace
My WeChat Connects to the Dragon Palace

data.title: Wo de Wei Xin Tong Longgong
data.title_english: My WeChat Connects to the Dragon Palace
title_synonyms: My WeChat is connected to Dragon Palace
data.synopsis:
Luo Yun, an orphan boy, has a mysterious background. When he became an adult, he was accidentally pulled into the "East China Sea Dragon Palace Chat Group". After exchanging cultivation secrets from the immortal friends in the group, his cultivation level increased greatly. Since then, he has transformed into "Luo Yuan Shangxian" and started his journey of cultivating immortals between the human and immortal worlds. 

Relying on the information gap and witty planning of the immortal friends in the WeChat group, Luo Yun exchanged spicy strips for immortal pills and cola for spiritual treasures, constantly improving himself, helping the weak and upholding justice in the real world. As the Overlord Seafood Company rose all the way in the two worlds, Luo Yun was involved in the great dispute between Peach Blossom Spring and Chaos Star Sea because of the mystery of his life experience.

(Source: iQIYI)

data.title: Kanpai
data.synopsis:
Space-born Edward meets Sakura at a spaceship bar where she introduces him to her country's national drink: Japanese sake. She uses her expertise growing up at a sake brewery to educate Edward on how sake is made, the different types of sake, and sake drinking customs. Edward visits her family brewery and learns the sake brewing process firsthand and how important sake is to Japanese culture.

(Source: JapanSakeOfficial YouTube channel)

titles.title: Arafoo Otoko no Isekai Tsuuhan Seikatsu
The Mail Order Life of a Man Around 40 in Another World
アラフォー男の異世界通販
The Daily Life of a Middle-Aged Online Shopper in Another World

data.title: Around 40 Otoko no Isekai Tsuuhan
data.title_english: The Daily Life of a Middle-Aged Online Shopper in Another World
data.title_japanese: アラフォー男の異世界通販
title_synonyms: Arafoo Otoko no Isekai Tsuuhan Seikatsu
The Mail Order Life of a Man Around 40 in Another World
data.synopsis:
From nowhere, middle-aged illustrator Kenichi Hamada finds himself summoned to another world. Despite arriving in an unfamiliar land, he realizes he can still connect to an online shop named Shangri-La, which he frequented back in Japan, to order almost anything. Not long after, Kenichi comes across a town and, using Shangri-La, decides to become a merchant in the settlement.

By selling products from Earth, he is quickly able to make a living for himself while gaining acquaintances and the attention of local companies. However, the man just wants to live a quiet life without nuisances and leaves the town to build a cabin in a nearby forest. Though interrupted from time to time, there is nothing that can stop Kenichi from having his peaceful days.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Around 40 Otoko no Isekai Tsuuhan was released on Blu-ray in two box sets from April 25, 2025, to May 28, 2025.
